O5b_2_IDE_mapping_corrected.note: Numbers in prompt S3 were imprecise. These are from actual phase5bis_IDE_mapping.json.
O5b_2_IDE_mapping_corrected.key_finding: All 85 phantom cosmologies with w0 < -1.05 non-degenerate with IDE (min residual 0.51% > 0.5% tol). 7 near-boundary phantom cases converge only in near-LCDM regime (trivial reparametrization, beta~0).

open_concerns_non_blocking.description: Clarify that ΔD/D=0.94% applies only to converged near-LCDM pairs, not general IDE with significant β
